name: Freightos Limited
description: Freightos Limited operates a leading international freight booking and payment platform. The company's digital platform connects carriers, freight forwarders, and importers/exporters, facilitating real-time rate comparison, booking, and shipment management. Through its WebCargo and Freightos.com marketplaces, Freightos digitizes the global freight industry, making international shipping faster, more transparent, and more cost-effective for businesses worldwide.
